title: Aircrack-ng
description: Complete suite for WiFi network security assessment — capture, crack, and analyze wireless traffic.
fullExplanation: Aircrack-ng is a complete suite of tools for assessing WiFi network security. It covers monitoring (packet capture), attacking (deauthentication, fake AP), testing (WEP/WPA cracking), and cracking (dictionary and brute force). The suite includes airmon-ng (monitor mode), airodump-ng (capture), aireplay-ng (injection), and aircrack-ng (cracking).

tools.name: airmon-ng
tools.description: Enable/disable monitor mode on wireless interface

tools.name: airodump-ng
tools.description: Capture 802.11 frames — discover networks, capture WPA handshakes

tools.name: aireplay-ng
tools.description: Packet injection — deauth clients, fake authentication, ARP replay

tools.name: aircrack-ng
tools.description: Crack WEP keys and WPA/WPA2 PSK from captured handshakes

wpa2CrackWorkflow.description: Discover nearby networks — note BSSID and channel

keyFacts: WEP cracked in minutes — never use WEP
WPA2-PSK: capture 4-way handshake, then offline dictionary attack
PMKID attack: crack WPA2 without capturing handshake (hcxdumptool + hashcat)
WPA3-SAE: resistant to offline dictionary attacks — use WPA3
Monitor mode requires compatible wireless card (Alfa AWUS036ACH popular)
Deauth attack: send forged deauthentication frames to disconnect clients
Always get written authorization before testing wireless networks
